title: Lesson 622: 編む, 危うい, 怪しい...

items.gloss: to knit; to plait; to braid; to compile (anthology, dictionary, etc.); to edit
dangerous; in danger; facing imminent danger; precarious (situation); perilous (state, balance, etc.); in doubt; in jeopardy; uncertain; insecure; concerning; worrying

suspicious; dubious; questionable; dodgy; shady; fishy; doubtful; unsure; uncertain; unlikely; implausible; untrustworthy; unreliable; clumsy; awkward; shaky; poor; strange; weird; eerie; spooky; uncanny; ominous (e.g. weather); threatening; dangerous (e.g. financial situation); suspicious (of a potential amorous relation); mysterious; bewitching; alluring; enticing; enchanting
